    • MerchantAccount

      public MerchantAccount(int merchantID, String accountHolderName, String accountNumber, String contactName, String address, String phoneNumber, double creditLimit, String discountTypeStr, String login, String password, String accountStateStr)
      Instantiates a new Merchant account.
      Parameters:
      merchantID - the merchant id
      accountHolderName - the account holder name
      accountNumber - the account number
      contactName - the contact name
      address - the address
      phoneNumber - the phone number
      creditLimit - the credit limit
      discountTypeStr - the discount type str
      login - the login
      password - the password
      accountStateStr - the account state str

      accountHolderName - the account holder name

      contactName - the contact name
      address - the address
      phoneNumber - the phone number
      creditLimit - the credit limit
